items.caption:
Join me in London at @homelifeandyou and for the KonMari Consultant Course in October! If tidying is something you’re looking into more, if it’s something you’re passionate about, or if you’re curious on starting your own business in professional organization, I truly hope to see you there!❤️🇬🇧

📌Comment “LONDON” and I’ll send you more information on:
- How to get tickets to Home Life & You Live
- Learning more about what the KonMari Consultant Course is and how to sign up

The energy at the show is so special, and it always sparks so much joy looking into the audience and seeing how joyful everyone is!

The in-person KonMari Consultant Course in London is also one of my biggest highlights of the year, as it’s the only course we hold in person❤️I love being able to speak to attendees in person, taking 1-1 photos with everyone that attends, and also being able to immerse myself in the energy of the community!

🇬🇧London In-Person KonMari Consultant Course
📌Location: ExCeL London
🗓️Date: October 16-18th, 2026
👉Register at Events.konmari.com

#businesscertofication #professionalorganizer #professionalorganization #london #smallbusiness
items.transcript:
Marie Kondo.

Understand KonMari philosophy first, and then build your experiences by doing a lot of consulting. And hone your skills by networking as a KonMari consultant and help each other and share your thoughts and experiences. I want you to maximize your learning experiences, so this course is just the beginning to help you to be a KonMari consultant.

I went to train, absolutely amazing. I had the time of my life there. Then not long after, I got certified and I've never looked back. It's just such an amazing training.

The thing that makes me really happy is seeing other people kind of be the best version of themselves. So I thought that this was the perfect thing for me to do. For example, the KonMari community, it's just amazing the things that you can share and ask. So I actually don't feel lonely or miss my colleagues because I feel that I have colleagues again.
